monitor.title: Monitor

ampTabs.noAmpsAssigned: No amps assigned. Add amps to start monitoring.

scanner.title: Network Scanner
scanner.description: Discover AMP devices on your network

editProject.title: Edit Project
editProject.description: Update the name and description of this project.

deleteProject.title: Delete Project
deleteProject.confirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to delete

assignAmps.description: Add or remove amplifiers from this project

assignAmps.scanNote: Note: Other devices may become unreachable for a few seconds during scanning.
assignAmps.scanFailedNoDevices: No devices found or scan failed
assignAmps.allDiscoveredAssigned: All discovered devices are already assigned

sourceConfig.title: Source
sourceConfig.description: Per channel source selection with delay and trim values.
sourceConfig.alertDescription: Source selection, delay, and trim shown here are not covered by the device preset store/recall flow in this app.

linkingGroups.panelDescription: Manage channel linking centrally for this amplifier.
linkingGroups.inputMuteDescription: Build mute link groups for this amp by adding valid channel groups.
linkingGroups.outputMuteDescription: Build output mute link groups for this amp by adding valid channel groups.
linkingGroups.inputVolumeDescription: Build input volume link groups for this amp by adding valid channel groups.
linkingGroups.noiseGateDescription: Build noise gate link groups for this amp by adding valid channel groups.
linkingGroups.polarityDescription: Build polarity link groups for this amp by adding valid channel groups.
linkingGroups.trimOutDescription: Build output trim link groups for this amp by adding valid channel groups.
linkingGroups.delayOutDescription: Build output delay link groups for this amp by adding valid channel groups.
linkingGroups.inputEqDescription: Build input EQ link groups for this amp by adding valid channel groups.
linkingGroups.outputEqDescription: Build output EQ link groups for this amp by adding valid channel groups.
linkingGroups.helperText: Only currently unlinked channels can be used to build a new group.

validation.channelOutOfRange: Selected channel is out of range.

presets.storeDescription: Store current device state to preset {slot}.
presets.storeFallbackDescription: Choose a name for this preset.

heartbeat.changePowerModeDescription: Are you sure you want to switch output {channel} to {mode}?
heartbeat.changeBridgeModeDescription: Are you sure you want to turn bridge {state} for output pair {pairA} / {pairB}?
heartbeat.changeBridgeModeFallback: Are you sure you want to change bridge mode?
